N1.label: Platform Validation Through VP-001
N1.description: VP-001 registrational trial confirms Phase 1/2 efficacy in a sham-controlled setting. FDA accelerated approval follows. Platform validated for tissue-targeted RNA delivery beyond the liver. Partnership or licensing deals for renal and CNS programs materialise. Fair value: A$3.50+ per share.
N1.plain_english: VP-001 registrational trial confirms Phase 1/2 efficacy in a sham-controlled setting. FDA accelerated approval follows. Platform validated for tissue-targeted RNA delivery beyond the liver. Partnership or licensing deals materialise. Fair value: A$3.50+ per share.
N1.what_to_watch: VP-001 interim readout (H2 2026), FDA regulatory feedback, partnership announcements.
N1.upside: Material re-rating if VP-001 sham-controlled data validates Phase 1/2 signal.
N1.risk_plain: Monitor for change in probability weight post interim readout.

N2.label: Clinical Disappointment
N2.description: VP-001 registrational trial fails to replicate Phase 1/2 signal in sham-controlled setting. The small patient population (RP11 is ultra-rare) creates statistical noise. Failure invalidates the CPP platform thesis for ophthalmology. Fair value: A$0.40–0.70 per share (cash backing plus residual pipeline option value).
N2.plain_english: VP-001 registrational trial fails to replicate Phase 1/2 signal in sham-controlled setting. Failure invalidates the CPP platform thesis for ophthalmology. Fair value: A$0.40–0.70 per share.
N2.what_to_watch: VP-001 interim readout, statistical power assessment, safety signal monitoring.
N2.risk_plain: Severe downside if VP-001 fails; value converges to cash floor.

N3.label: Platform Acquired Pre-Approval
N3.description: A major pharmaceutical company acquires PYC for the CPP delivery platform before VP-001 regulatory approval. The acquirer values the platform's ability to deliver RNA drugs beyond the liver. Acquisition premium of 50–100% to current price. Fair value: A$2.00–3.00 per share.
N3.plain_english: A major pharmaceutical company acquires PYC for the CPP delivery platform before VP-001 regulatory approval. Acquisition premium of 50–100% to current price. Fair value: A$2.00–3.00 per share.
N3.what_to_watch: Strategic holder registration, major pharma partnership announcements, RNA therapeutics M&A activity.
N3.upside: Acquisition premium of 50–100% to current price.
N3.risk_plain: No disclosed acquisition interest; speculative scenario.

N4.label: Slow Burn, Platform Optionality Erodes
N4.description: VP-001 results are ambiguous rather than clearly positive or negative. The company enters an extended development cycle requiring additional trials and capital. Platform optionality erodes as competitors advance alternative delivery technologies. Cash runway extends but market loses patience. Fair value: A$0.80–1.20.
N4.plain_english: VP-001 results are ambiguous. The company enters an extended development cycle. Platform optionality erodes as competitors advance. Market loses patience with pre-revenue biotech. Fair value: A$0.80–1.20.
N4.what_to_watch: VP-001 ambiguous readout, competitor delivery technology progress, market sentiment on pre-revenue biotech.
N4.risk_plain: Downside if VP-001 is inconclusive and additional capital is required.

big_picture: Initiating coverage on PYC Therapeutics (ASX: PYC) with a BUY stance at A$1.42. Probability-weighted value of A$2.39 implies a 68% gap. The CPP platform addresses the largest unmet need in RNA therapeutics (beyond-liver delivery). VP-001 Phase 1/2 showed durable efficacy in RP11. Sham-controlled registrational trial interim readout expected H2 2026. Cash of A$94M provides >24-month runway.

hypotheses.title: Platform Validation Through VP-001 — Registrational trial confirms Phase 1/2 efficacy
Clinical Disappointment — VP-001 fails to replicate Phase 1/2 signal in sham-controlled
Platform Acquired Pre-Approval — Major pharma acquires PYC for CPP delivery platform
Slow Burn, Platform Optionality Erodes — VP-001 results ambiguous, extended development
